questions.question: Explain the difference between an unigram model and a bigram model in the context of an N-gram statistical language model. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.

Which of the following statements regarding the Paninton Framework is correct? (a) It is used for language modeling (b) It is based on the idea that language is composed of units (c) It is used for sentiment analysis (d) All of the above
options: Option (a) is correct, Option (b) is correct, Option (c) is correct
Option (a) is correct, Option (b) is correct, Option (d) is correct
Option (a) is correct, Option [c) is correct, Option (d) is correct
Option (a) is correct, Option (c) is correct, Option (d) is correct

questions.question: A Karaka is a unit of meaning in a language. According to Karaka theory, what is the primary function of a Karaka in language modeling?
